storeInfoInHeader yashira amakuru yatanzwe mu mutwe w'inyandiko yo gusubiza HTTP wariho munsi y'ubwoko bwatanzwe.
Iyi mbuga itekereza ku bwoko bw'amakuru nka: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Bishirwa nk'ibiyunguruzo 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', na 'Cache-Control', mu buryo bwo kugereranya.
Ibirimo by'amakuru bisomwa mu byifuzo by'umukoresha.
Niba ubwoko bw'amakuru bwatanzwe ari bwiza, umutwe w'inyandiko yo gusubiza wakoreshejwe ugomba kugira ubwo. Niba ikintu icyo ari cyose kibaye nabi, umbuga igomba gusubiza urutonde rw'imitwe y'umutwe wambere nta mpinduka zihari.
